mapper.sql: id, supplier_id, settlement_id, title, description, amount, direction, biz_type, biz_no, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_wallet_transactions (supplier_id, settlement_id, title, description, amount, direction, biz_type, biz_no, created_at) VALUES (#{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{settlementId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{direction, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bizType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bizNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO supplier_wallet_transactions (supplier_id, settlement_id, title, description, amount, direction, biz_type, biz_no, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.settlementId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.direction, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.bizType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.bizNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM supplier_wallet_transactions WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM supplier_wallet_transactions WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
DELETE FROM supplier_wallet_transactions WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
